# Make — Pricing

## Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Annual | Active Scenarios | Min Interval | Max Run Time | Max File Size |
|------|---------|--------|------------------|--------------|--------------|---------------|
| Free | $0 | — | 2 | 15 min | 5 min | 5 MB |
| Core | $9 | — | Unlimited | 1 min | 40 min | 100 MB |
| Pro | $16 | — | Unlimited | 1 min | 40 min | 250 MB |
| Teams | $29 | — | Unlimited | 1 min | 40 min | 500 MB |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom | Unlimited | 1 min | 40 min | 1 GB |

*Annual billing: Save 15% or more.*

## Credit Model

- Monthly operations/credits: Free (1,000), Core (10,000), Pro (10,000), Teams (10,000), Enterprise (custom)
- Credits are prepaid and consumed per execution
- Annual prepaid credits expire after 12 months
- 5 GB data transfer = ~10,000 monthly operations

## Data Transfer & Storage

| Plan | Data Transfer | Execution Log Storage | Unlimited Users |
|------|---------------|-----------------------|-----------------|
| Free | 512 MB | 7 days | No |
| Core | 5 GB | 30 days | No |
| Pro | 5 GB | 30 days | No |
| Teams | 5 GB | 30 days | Yes |
| Enterprise | Custom | 60 days | Yes |

## TCO Notes

- Free plan severely limited (15-min intervals, 5-min execution, 2 active scenarios) — not viable for production cold email workflows
- Core at $9/mo is the entry point for actual automation; 10,000 operations/month at this tier
- Teams plan required for multi-user/multi-SDR workflows (unlimited users at $29/mo is competitive)
- Enterprise for large-scale multi-domain or high-volume requirements
- No per-execution overage charges once on a plan
- Simple usage-based model with annual discount option
